what_it_does: Defines workshop slide kinds, layout templates, motif background recipes, theme-to-motif mappings, helper functions for filtering/building pages, and a JSX motif layer renderer on the global window object.
observations: Defines many deck and brochure layout presets with names, kinds, descriptions, icons, applicable document types, and build functions returning block sections.
Provides helpers to list layouts for a document type and build a page object from a layout id.
Defines motif metadata with names, descriptions, and bleed hints.
Defines themes that map slide kinds to motif ids.
Renders motif-specific background layers for watermark, section marker, and blueprint motifs using inline SVG.
standouts: Layout presets encode both generic slide structures and ConceptV-specific pitch, investment, partnership, and contact slides.
The motif system separates background visual rhythm from slide content blocks.
Blueprint motif includes detailed architectural drawing marks plus a generated grid overlay.
conventions: Uses window-scoped globals for registries, helpers, and the motif component.
Layout build functions return arrays of block descriptors shaped as { kind, data }.
Themes are simple maps from slide kind to motif id.
Document applicability is expressed with forTypes arrays.
Uses brand-specific color literals directly inside JSX/SVG.
concerns: The local variable m in WSMotifLayer is assigned but not used.
If an unknown motif id is passed, metadata falls back to ivory but the CSS class still uses the original motif id.
Page ids rely on Date.now plus index, which may be sensitive to repeated calls with the same index in the same millisecond.
notes: This file is the workshop registry for slide presets and background motif behavior.
questions: How are WS_BLOCKS defaults defined and validated before WS_buildPage uses them?
Are motif bleed values consumed elsewhere to adjust foreground styling?
Should unknown motifs normalize to ivory in both metadata and class naming?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the file: it contains slide layout templates plus theme and motif definitions/rendering.
intention_signals: It appears intended to make branded presentation and brochure pages quickly constructible from reusable presets while allowing themes to control background treatment by slide kind.
novelty: The file combines content block presets, pitch-deck-specific narrative layouts, and motif-rendered background recipes in one workshop-facing registry.
contribution: Contributes a reusable catalog of slide/page layouts, document-type filtering, page construction logic, theme mappings, and JSX motif rendering that a fused system would keep as presentation-template and visual-rhythm substrate.
summary_for_embedding: A global React/JSX workshop configuration file defining ConceptV slide kinds, layout presets, motif background recipes, theme mappings, page-building helpers, and motif SVG rendering.
intention_for_embedding: Built to let a deck or brochure editor instantiate branded slide structures and apply coherent background motifs based on document theme and slide kind.
